rationale: Ukraine reclaiming territory and doubling attacks on Russian logistics is a direct, qualitative positive shift in the war for Ukrainian residents — a meaningful new development above the decayed baseline.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: A qualitative shift in Ukraine's military position — territorial gains and intensified strikes on Russian supply lines directly affect the safety and morale of Ukrainian residents. This is a new positive development.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic attention partially diverted; no concrete change to Western military aid for Ukraine, but sustained uncertainty about US focus.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: EU defense fragmentation is indirectly negative for Ukraine, as a weaker European defense industry means slower long-term support capacity for Ukrainian needs.
